name: KneeArthroscopyDTR
title: Knee Arthroscopy – Documentation Template and Rules
description: Prior authorization documentation requirements for knee arthroscopy procedures.

item.text: Is the diagnosis of a knee condition documented in the medical record?
Has the patient attempted conservative therapy (e.g., PT, NSAIDs) for at least 6 weeks?
Is imaging (X-ray or MRI) documenting the knee condition available?
